scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check package.json compose.yaml README.md AGENTS.md PRINCIPLES.md infra/README.md infra/AGENTS.md .github/workflows/deployment_pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md scripts/*.mjs apps/ade-api/package.json packages/ade-config/README.md packages/ade-engine/README.md
scripts.package:python: uv build --directory packages/ade-engine && uv build --directory packages/ade-config
scripts.test: pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm build
